label.quota.admin.help: Counter list that can be reinitialized to reflect correct values.
label.quota.documentsCountUpdater.descri: Counts the non-folderish documents in each folder.
label.quota.setMaxSize: Choose a maximum size limit and save to activate quota.
label.quota.documentsCountSizeUpdater.de: Keeps track of used space and enforces quota.
label.quotaException.QuotaExceeded: Your content can not be created, the quota of the container {0} is exceeded.
label.quotaException.QuotaCanNotBeSet: Maximum size of a parent will be exceeded. Choose a smaller size or reduce maximum size of other space.
label.quota.error.display: Cannot display statistics. Please run initial computation from Admin / Quota.
user.quota.updater.label: Per-user quota
user.quota.updater.description: Tracks total bytes owned by each user and enforces per-user upload size and total quota.
error.quota.user.upload-too-large: File exceeds the per-user upload size limit.
error.quota.user.quota-exceeded: Your user quota has been reached.
label.quota.user.recompute.help: Recompute byte counters from scratch. The recompute runs asynchronously via the Bulk Action Framework; a notification will be shown when it completes.
label.quota.user.recompute.done: Per-user counter recompute completed: {0} user(s) processed, {1} skipped.
